overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a tan suit walking through a rainy 1960s urban environment at dusk. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections with vintage 1950s traffic, and passes a gas station while the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with historic residential buildings

events.description: character stops at curb to wait for vintage cars to pass before crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a chain-link fence, approaching a crosswalk intersection

notable_agents.action: vintage teal station wagon driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence with diagonal support beams running along the sidewalk
red octagonal stop sign mounted on a pole at the street corner
two-story historic house with wrap-around white porch and columns
red fire hydrant located on the sidewalk near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a chain-link fence in a residential area. A historic house with a white porch stands across the street, and vintage 1950s cars drive past the intersection. The character pauses at the curb near a red fire hydrant, waiting for traffic to clear before crossing.

events.description: character steps off the curb and begins crossing the street
vintage sedan stops to yield for the character crossing the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, navigating between vintage cars on the wet asphalt

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking past the character on the sidewalk
vintage brown sedan waiting at the crosswalk for the character to pass

entered.detail: blue and white gas station canopy visible in the distance down the street
utility poles with multiple power lines stretching across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character steps into the crosswalk and crosses the wet asphalt street as vintage cars navigate around. A pedestrian in a white shirt walks past on the opposite sidewalk. The character passes a red fire hydrant and heads toward a gas station visible in the distance, with power lines stretching across the orange-tinted sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway alongside drainage canal approaching gas station

events.description: character moves from street level onto an elevated walkway with concrete barriers
approaching gas station where several people are gathered under umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway next to a concrete drainage canal, approaching a gas station

notable_agents.action: group of people standing under umbrellas near the gas station entrance

entered.detail: steep concrete drainage canal with water flowing at the bottom
metal safety railing running along the edge of the elevated walkway
illuminated neon sign reading 'OPEN 24 HOURS' on the gas station building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated stone walkway beside a concrete drainage canal, passing under streetlights. The gas station with its blue canopy and 'OPEN 24 HOURS' sign grows larger ahead. Several pedestrians stand under umbrellas near the gas station entrance as the character approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with mixed residential buildings

events.description: character enters the crosswalk to cross the second intersection
character pauses to let a vintage car pass before continuing across

agents.ego_description: crossing the second intersection, walking past parked cars and other pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket and cap crossing the street in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: two-story pink wooden house with green roof and white trim
single-story dark green wooden cottage with front porch

segments.scene_description: The character crosses another wet intersection, navigating between vintage cars and pedestrians. A pink two-story house and a green wooden cottage line the opposite street. The character walks alongside another pedestrian in a dark jacket, continuing through the rainy 1960s urban neighborhood as the sky lightens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy 1960s urban neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential street to a bustling gas station area. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a chain-link fence, pausing at a red fire hydrant before crossing a street filled with vintage cars. As the character moves across the wet asphalt, the view expands to reveal power lines stretching across an orange-tinted sky and a distant gas station. The scene then shifts to an elevated stone walkway beside a concrete drainage canal, where the blue canopy and glowing sign of the gas station grow larger as pedestrians huddle under umbrellas. Finally, the camera follows the character across another wet intersection past colorful wooden cottages and a pink house, continuing through the neighborhood as the sky begins to lighten.
